summary: Kimi Antonelli converted his pole position into victory at Silverstone, passing Lewis Hamilton during the sprint race to build momentum heading into Sunday's main event. The Mercedes driver's performance silenced pre-race doubts about whether he could sustain his pace over a full distance, with Hamilton's home crowd witnessing his teammate pull clear in the closing laps. Antonelli's win extends Mercedes' lead in the constructors' championship while establishing him as a genuine title contender alongside Russell in the drivers' standings.
